name: skillforge
description: Community skill plugins for Claude Code - developer cards, motion graphics, and more

plugins.name: example-skill-pack
plugins.description: Example plugin demonstrating the plugin structure for Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-card
plugins.description: Generate a developer identity card from git history. Analyzes commits, assigns an AI persona, and renders a shareable SVG card.

plugins.name: carousel-maker
plugins.description: Create carousel slide decks with structured content and styled rendering

plugins.name: motion-graphics
plugins.description: Create motion graphics with Remotion and Gemini AI

plugins.name: paper-dissector
plugins.description: Deeply analyze academic papers from PDF. Extracts structured analysis, generates markdown summaries, renders visual summary cards, and enables interactive Q&A.
